title: astrolepis obscura
intro: Astrolepis obscura, also known as the obscure lipfern, is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. It is native to Mexico and Central America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Astrolepis obscura include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astrolepis obscura can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in poultices and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
